title: Integrational Scar Tissue Therapy
description: Two days on how to assess and treat scars. It covered the phases of wound healing, a structured way to assess a scar, manual work on the scar and the tissue around it, and supporting methods such as lymphatic drainage, taping and cupping.
detail: Med Coach · 20 didactic hours · 31.08–1.09.2024, Kraków · Certificate No. KRK25/09/2024
